codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal CSS-only fix. Added background-color to each .dashboard-donut-segment-0 through .dashboard-donut-segment-5 class in web/src/styles.css using the exact hex values specified in the feature description. The change is 6 lines modified (no additions/deletions), each line gaining a background-color property matching its existing stroke value. All 6 colors verified correct: #56d8ff, #82f0b8, #ffcc7d, #ff907c, #82a8ff, #c79bff. The background-color CSS property has no effect on SVG elements (confirmed by CSS spec and worker's browser-based verification), so SVG donut arcs with fill:none and stroke colors remain unaffected. The DashboardPage.tsx component uses these classes on both SVG <circle> elements (line 88) and HTML <span> legend swatches (line 240), confirming the dual-use pattern the fix correctly handles.

summary: Pass. The fix correctly adds background-color to 6 CSS segment classes so HTML span legend swatches become visible, while SVG circle elements remain unaffected. Implementation is minimal (6 lines changed in 1 file), colors match the specification exactly, and verification was thorough (typecheck, 108 tests, agent-browser visual + JS eval checks for both span backgrounds and SVG strokes). No issues found.
